rule_explanation: {"scenario":"STRUCTURING","version":"v2","rule_summary":"Customer CUST-0003 made 7 cash deposits totaling $63,950 from 2026-04-23 to 2026-05-02; each deposit was between $8,500 and $9,800 and below the $10,000 CTR reporting threshold.","thresholds_at_detection":{"min_txn_amount":8000,"max_txn_amount":9999,"min_count":3,"window_days":10,"threshold_change_reason":"Reduced window from 14 to 10 days based on FP analysis"},"observed":{"customer_id":"CUST-0003","date_range":"2026-04-23 to 2026-05-02","transaction_count":7,"total_amount_usd":63950,"amounts_usd":[8500,9100,8750,9800,9200,8900,9700],"amount_range_usd":"8500-9800","accounts_used":2,"triggering_transaction_ids":["TXN-000001","TXN-000002","TXN-000003","TXN-000004","TXN-000005","TXN-000006","TXN-000007"]},"red_flags":["All cash deposits fell below the CTR reporting threshold","Multiple accounts received deposits during the same 10-day window","Pattern repeated without a documented cash-heavy business rationale"]}
